privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic document formatting task for a biology exam. The task uses a synthetically-generated DOCX file created by the setup script containing the text 'Westfield Regional High School', 'Biology 101 — Final Examination', 'Part A: Multiple Choice', 'Part B: Short Answer', 'Part C: Essay Questions', and '--- END OF EXAMINATION ---'. The expected output path is /home/ga/Documents/bio101_final_exam.docx. Margin specifications use the OOXML standard conversion of 914400 EMUs per inch, with a tolerance of 91440 EMU (0.1 inch). The verifier checks 7 criteria: title block formatting (centering, bold, sizes 16pt and 14pt), instructions italicization, Heading 2 styles for three section headers, body text formatting (Liberation Serif or Times New Roman, 12pt, 1.5 line spacing), 1-inch margins on all sides, footer with 'Biology 101 — Final Examination' and page numbers, and centered bold end marker. Passing requires a score of 60 out of 100 points.
